name: Rachel Cynthia
headline: Software developer building scalable applications with Java, Golang, React, and React Native.
summary: I’m a software developer with more than 3 years of experience building scalable applications. I follow TDD principles to write clean, maintainable code, and have worked extensively on microservices, containerization, and CI/CD in Agile teams.

highlights: Designed and developed full-stack applications, leading architectural decisions to support scalable, maintainable systems.
Engineered a Roaring Bitmap index with caching for millions-of-record scale, improving processing efficiency by 30%.
Built an agentic AI meeting tracker that unified data from internal platforms and reduced manual tracking overhead.
Contributed to AWS cloud migration initiatives, streamlining pipelines and reducing deployment errors.
Configured MongoDB data pipelines using aggregation and views to improve data availability for dashboards.
Introduced pre-login APIs that brought in 50,000 new customers.
Implemented containerised microservices with Docker and Kubernetes and set up GoCD CI/CD pipelines.
Used Agile and XP practices, TDD, pair programming, and continuous integration to deliver maintainable code.
Architected loan journey automation that increased profits by 40%.
Improved image rendering performance, reducing load time by 3000ms (30% faster).

awards: Bicentenary Global Futures Scholarship for the top 100 students from 20 countries based on merit.
Outstanding Solution Finder in an Ideathon conducted by ATAL for over 500 students.
community: Regular environmental volunteering at local parks and community gardens to support urban sustainability.
Crocheting handmade items for charity donations to support local organisations.
